name: gds-agent
description: Neo4j Graph Data Science MCP server + graph-analysis skill

neo4j_uri.title: Neo4j URI
neo4j_uri.description: Connection URI, e.g. neo4j://localhost:7687 or neo4j+s://xxxx.databases.neo4j.io

aura_api_client_id.title: Aura API client ID
aura_api_client_id.description: Optional: enables Aura Graph Analytics session mode

aura_api_client_secret.title: Aura API client secret
aura_api_client_secret.description: Optional: Aura Graph Analytics session mode

aura_api_project_id.title: Aura project ID
aura_api_project_id.description: Optional: only needed if the Aura API client can access multiple projects
